overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through the sunlit medieval city of Beauclair. The character passes through ornate stone archways, traverses cobblestone courtyards, and climbs to a scenic viewpoint overlooking a lake and mountains before descending.

events.description: exits the covered archway into the open sunlit courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone archway into the courtyard beyond

notable_agents.action: small figure in red clothing standing near the central tree

entered.detail: ornate stone archway with intricate carvings and columns
dark stone statue of a robed figure flanking the entrance
dark stone statue of a robed figure flanking the entrance
large mature tree with dense green foliage in the plaza center
cream-colored stone buildings with distinctive red tiled roofs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a third-person view following a white-haired character through a monumental stone archway. The camera emerges from the shadowed gate into a bright sunlit courtyard dominated by a large central tree and surrounded by Mediterranean-style buildings with red roofs.

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone path toward the right side of the courtyard

notable_agents.action: person in yellow tunic and red boots walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: elaborate stone gazebo with red roof and gothic spires overlooking water
stone balustrade with arched openings overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open courtyard passing the central tree, which shifts to the left as the camera moves forward. An ornate gazebo with red roofing becomes visible on the right, and the character follows a path alongside a stone railing overlooking the water.

events.description: begins ascending the wide stone staircase
passes under a decorative stone archway while climbing

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs alongside the building wall, following the NPC ahead

notable_agents.action: person in yellow tunic continuing up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with worn cobblestone steps ascending steeply
tall stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal overlooking the water
decorative pointed archway at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from flat ground to ascending a grand stone staircase carved into the hillside. The path narrows between the building wall on the left and the coastal railing on the right, passing a classical statue before reaching an archway at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic viewpoint terrace with panoramic vista

events.description: emerges onto the open viewpoint terrace with panoramic views
turns to face the panoramic view of the lake and mountains

agents.ego_description: reaching the terrace and looking out over the scenic landscape, then turning to survey the view

entered.detail: open stone platform with balustrade overlooking the landscape
wooden easel holding a colorful abstract painting with paint supplies nearby
ornate black metal brazier on a stone pedestal
distant blue mountain range across the lake under hazy skies
calm blue lake visible through the arched balustrade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a scenic viewpoint terrace featuring a painter's easel and an ornate brazier. The camera pans to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of a blue lake surrounded by distant mountains, with the red rooftops of the city visible below.

events.description: turns around and begins descending the stairs back down

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back down the stone stairs toward the lower city

entered.detail: same stone staircase now being descended

segments.scene_description: After briefly enjoying the view, the character turns and begins descending the stone stairs back toward the lower city. The scenic vista disappears from view as the camera moves back under the archway and down the staircase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from the shadowed depths of a city gate up to a panoramic mountain vista before descending back into the urban landscape. It begins by following a white-haired character through a monumental stone archway, emerging from the shade into a bright, sunlit courtyard filled with red-roofed Mediterranean buildings and a large central tree. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up along a stone railing overlooking the water and passes an ornate gazebo before transitioning into a climb up a grand stone staircase carved into the hillside. The camera then emerges through a high archway onto a scenic terrace with a painter's easel, panning to reveal a breathtaking view of a blue lake and distant mountains above the city rooftops. Finally, the character turns away from the vista and begins descending the stairs, with the wide landscape disappearing as the camera moves back under the archway toward the lower city.
